title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta presents production evaluation strategies for autonomous AI agents that move beyond static offline benchmarks. The talk addresses continuous evaluation pipelines integrated into production, covering tool use assessment, reasoning validation, drift detection, and human-in-the-loop systems for real-world agentic workflows.
